dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your activities
dashboard.appointmentQuestion: Have you made an appointment this month?
dashboard.healthMessage: Take care of your health by scheduling regular consultations
healthTips: 💧 Drink at least 1.5L of water per day to stay well hydrated.
🚶‍♂️ 30 minutes of daily walking improves your cardiovascular health.
🥗 Prefer fresh fruits and vegetables for optimal vitamin intake.
😴 7 to 8 hours of sleep per night strengthens your immune system.
🧘‍♀️ Take 10 minutes a day to meditate and reduce stress.
🏃‍♂️ Regular physical activity improves your overall well-being.
🌞 Expose yourself to the sun for 15 minutes a day for vitamin D.
📱 Limit screen time before bed for better sleep.
🍎 Eat at least 5 servings of fruits and vegetables a day.
🧠 Stay mentally active with puzzles or reading.
